pack - bundle a project directory into a single archive

Usage: pack [options] <file>

Options:
  -o, --output <path>   write the archive to <path> (default: ./out.pack)
  -f, --force           overwrite <path> if it already exists
  -v, --verbose         print each file as it is added
      --level <n>       compression level 0-9 (default: 6)
  -h, --help            show this help

Examples:
  pack build             pack ./build into ./out.pack
  pack run ./dist        pack ./dist
  pack ship --force app  overwrite and pack ./app

Note: "build", "run", and "ship" above are ordinary <file> arguments in the
examples, NOT sub-commands. pack has no sub-command tree; it always takes a
single <file> positional plus the options listed above.
